lastReleaseMessage: audit-digest notify sends UTF-8 bytes + reads docs as UTF-8; fixes Discord 50109 on em-dash/section-sign headlines

barRaise.topFinding: v1.0 landed and both prior carry-over MEDIUMs are closed: the 864 MB .git bloat is now a written Won't-fix locked decision in PROJECT_SPEC section 8, and v1.0 is cut with cadence moved to weekly constellation-only. The 2026-06-24 canonical audit reads no drift and all version markers agree at v1.0.1. One new MEDIUM surfaced that the spec-vs-code audit cannot see: the CLAUDE.md print hazard tells a future editor the print CSS uses the visibility-toggle pattern not display:none, but the shipped print path in styles/label.css is exactly a display:none toggle (body > * display:none plus #print-stage display:flex), the parallel print-stage render PROJECT_SPEC section 7 describes. The handler hazard is inverted from reality. Two LOWs trail: the v1.0.0/v1.0.1 CHANGELOG entries are release-script stubs, and the print path has no manual confirmation in ~31 days. Project is healthy and feature-complete.
